raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I purchased airfare through XXXX XXXX for XXXX passengers on a XXXX itinerary. The total charges were applied to my American Express account. Six days later, on XX/XX/year>, XXXX XXXX unilaterally modified the booked itinerary without my consent, constituting a material change to the original contractual agreement. 
I did not accept the modified itinerary. XXXX XXXX initially offered a travel credit subject to restrictive conditions specifically, that it be used for travel departing from XXXX, for the same passengers, within one year. I rejected these conditions and formally demanded a full refund in writing, notifying senior leadership at XXXX XXXX that I had not consented to the itinerary change and was cancelling the booking accordingly. 
XXXX XXXX confirmed the cancellation but issued only a partial reimbursement on XX/XX/year> : Tickets originally billed at {$400.00} reimbursed : {$20.00} Tickets originally billed at {$470.00} reimbursed : {$28.00} I disputed the transactions with AMEX who re-billed the charges on a couple of occasions. The balances on XXXX disputed transactions represent charges for services that were never rendered. I was billed for a flight that XXXX XXXX itself modified, which I never agreed to, and which ultimately did not function/operate/happen as originally sold or contracted to me. 

I filed a formal complaint with the New York State Attorney General 's Office of Consumer Protection and requested their investigation and intervention in this matter. 

In light of the foregoing, I respectfully request your help and assitance so that American Express can review and confirm the XXXX pending disputed transactions from my account immediately, in compliance with applicable consumer protection laws and obligations under the Fair Credit Billing Act. The services contracted were modified after the contractual agreement ( breach of contract ) and no services were rendered whatsoever ( lack of service ) I submitted supporting documentation to AMEX, including the original booking confirmation, XXXX XXXX XXXX notification of itinerary change, my written cancellation and refund demand, and previous explanations in writing, to no avail. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX
